prompt: Check if this node is an icon (small size, vector children, no text) and is not a component or instance. Icon nodes should always be componentized for reuse.
why: Icon nodes that are not components cannot be reused consistently across the design system.
impact: Developers will hardcode icons instead of using a shared icon component.
fix: Convert this icon node to a component and publish it to the design system library.

prompt: Check if this node uses color fills or strokes that are not bound to a variable. Dark mode support requires all colors to be tokenized via Figma variables.
why: Hardcoded colors cannot be swapped for dark mode variants.
impact: Dark mode implementation will require manual overrides for every affected node.
fix: Replace hardcoded color values with Figma variables that support mode switching.
